globalStyle: Original YjsE side-view pixel foliage with three deterministic variants per species, separated crown pads, visible negative space, binary alpha, and native 16x16 source frames.
referenceUse: Composition direction only. Runtime sheets are deterministic native-size pixel output, not cropped, sampled, traced, or scaled from the reference.
variantContract: Variants A/B/C deliberately move crown mass and negative space while sharing exact cardinal seam sockets, allowing stable atlas-packed runtime selection without extra draw calls.

briefs.subject: Loose Oak Crown Pads V2A
briefs.prompt: Author an original oak 16-mask foliage variant with two to four irregular leaf clumps, left-weighted crown mass and upper open pocket, large transparent gaps, and narrow organic joins.
requirements: Export exactly sixteen native 16x16 frames in top-right-bottom-left mask order 0-15.
Keep every frame sparse; even mask 15 must preserve transparent corners and internal air instead of filling the tile square.
Cross declared sides only through compatible sockets shared by all variants: x 6-8 for top-bottom joins and y 8-9 for left-right joins; shade sockets without a dark seam.
Use only binary alpha and the forest oak green palette; do not raster-scale or derive runtime pixels from the visual-direction reference.
